title: China Blocks Meta’s $2 Billion Acquisition of AI Firm Manus
title_cn: 中国阻止 Meta 以 20 亿美元收购人工智能公司 Manus
summary: China has decided to block Meta Platforms Inc.’s $2 billion acquisition of agentic AI startup Manus, making a surprise move to unwind a controversial deal that’s drawn fire for the leakage of technology to the US.

title_cn: 巴斯夫因战争扰乱再次提高塑料添加剂价格
summary: BASF SE is raising prices on plastic-protecting chemicals, commonly used in the car and consumer goods industries, for a second time since the start of the Iran conflict in February.

title: Philippines Warns Agencies Not to Send Seamen to Persian Gulf
title_cn: 菲律宾警告各机构不要派遣海员前往波斯湾
summary: The Philippines is telling crewing agencies to stop sending its nationals to the Persian Gulf, according to people familiar with the matter, making it more difficult for shipowners to rotate the thousands of seamen stuck on vessels behind the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Gold Steadies as Attempts to Restart US-Iran Peace Talks Falter
title_cn: 重启美伊和谈的尝试受挫，金价持稳
summary: Gold was steady as efforts to resume peace talks between the US and Iran stalled and energy flows via the Strait of Hormuz remained choked, two months into a war that’s upended global markets and raised inflation risks.

title: US Stocks Slip From Highs as Hormuz Remains Shut: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 由于霍尔木兹海峡仍然关闭，美国股市从高位下跌：市场结束
summary: US stocks slipped from record highs as the Strait of Hormuz remained shut, lifting oil prices, with traders also eyeing major megacap tech earnings and central bank decisions this week.

title_cn: Sun Pharma 以 120 亿美元收购总部位于新泽西州的 Organon
summary: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. has agreed to acquire New York-listed women’s health-care company Organon & Co., expanding its global reach with one of the biggest outbound deals by an Indian company.

title: Markets in 3 Minutes 4/27/2026
title_cn: 3 分钟了解市场 2026 年 4 月 27 日
summary: Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson, Tom Mackenzie and Paul Dobson break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade." For up to the minute market intelligence and insight, click MLIV . (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Europe faces recession if the Strait of Hormuz crisis isn’t resolved within a month, according to Mark Dowding, chief investment officer for fixed income of RBC Bluebay Asset Management.

title: Romanian Ex-Ruling Party Joins Far-Right Bid to Topple Premier
title_cn: 罗马尼亚前执政党加入极右翼阵营推翻总理

summary: Investors are piling back into some of the riskiest markets, as demand for frontier assets picks up after an initial war-driven selloff.

summary: Euro-area companies expect substantially higher selling prices and input costs due to the Iran war, adding to inflation concerns at the European Central Bank.

title: Odd Lots: What’s Actually Going On With Private Credit (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的事情：私人信贷到底发生了什么（播客）
summary: The private credit market has grown enormously fast in recent years — so much so that by some estimates it’s now bigger than the market for junk-rated corporate bonds. So what’s driven all that growth? What impact has private credit had on other types of corporate debt? And why are there so many concerns around the space right now? In this episode, we speak with John Sheehan and Craig Manchuck, two veteran portfolio managers for the strategic income fund at Osterweis Capital Management. We talk

title: Tokyo Gas Hikes Household Base Charge for First Time in 46 Years
title_cn: 东京燃气 46 年来首次提高家庭基本费用
summary: Tokyo Gas Co. will raise its base charge for the first time in nearly half a century to offset higher costs and declining consumption.

title: Europe Power Prices Crash to Record Lows on Strong Solar Output
title_cn: 太阳能发电强劲，欧洲电价跌至历史新低
summary: German power prices plunged to record lows on Sunday as solar generation surged and mild weather curbed weekend demand.

title: Hong Kong Airport Taps Local Debt Boom for $1.9 Billion Plan
title_cn: 香港机场利用本地债务热潮实施 19 亿美元计划
summary: Hong Kong’s airport operator plans to raise at least HK$15 billion ($1.9 billion) from its only public bond sale this year, according to people familiar with the matter, adding to a surge in debt sales denominated in the city’s currency.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 4/27/2026 (Video)
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 2026 年 4 月 27 日（视频）

title: Iran Said to Offer US New Proposal to Reopen Strait of Hormuz | Daybreak Europe 04/27/2026
title_cn: 据称伊朗将向美国提出重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的新提案欧洲黎明 04/27/2026
summary:
On today's show, Iran has reportedly offered the US a new proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Oil pared gains and stocks advanced following the report by Axios. Iran's semi-official news agency, Tasnim, says nuclear issues will not be discussed until the US ends its blockade of Hormuz. Axios says President Trump will hold a White House Situation Room meeting today.

And bond traders will be keeping a close eye on this week's rate decisions by the world's most important central banks. The Fed is set to lead the way with a hold, as policymakers watch for the impact of higher energy costs on inflation. The Bank of Japan, Bank of England and European Central Bank also publish rate decisions this week.

Correct: Video edited at 00;39;30 to show images of HSBC bank (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Australian Toll Operator Surges on Takeover Bid at A$7.4 Billion Valuation
title_cn: 澳大利亚收费运营商收购报价飙升至 74 亿澳元
summary: IFM Investors Pty. has launched a takeover bid for toll road operator Atlas Arteria Ltd., arguing the Sydney-listed group it already partly owns has underperformed on returns, strategy and operations.

title: Emirates NBD Plans Middle East’s First AT1 Bond Sale Since War
title_cn: 阿联酋国民银行 (Emirates NBD) 计划发售中东战后首笔 AT1 债券
summary: Emirates NBD Bank PJSC is looking to sell an Additional Tier 1 bond, in what would be the first offering of the riskiest type of bank debt by a Middle Eastern lender since the start of the war.

title: Apollo Buys Forvia’s Auto Interiors Unit for €1.82 Billion
title_cn: Apollo 以 18.2 亿欧元收购 Forvia 的汽车内饰部门
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc. agreed to buy Forvia SE’s auto interiors business for an enterprise value of €1.82 billion ($2.1 billion), helping the French supplier cut debt and streamline its business.

title: China Taps Another Tool to Drain Excess Cash From Market
title_cn: 中国利用另一种工具从市场上排出多余现金
summary: China’s central bank is taking a further step to rein in a liquidity glut in its financial system by reducing the amount of medium-term funds it lends out to banks.

title: Japanese Public Wants Energy-Saving as Takaichi Holds Back
title_cn: 日本公众希望节能，但高市却犹豫不决
summary: The war in the Middle East is putting pressure on the Japanese government to consider energy-saving measures, a challenge for Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi as she seeks to calm public anxiety over potential shortages.

title: BlueBay CIO: Markets Appear Complacent About War Fallout
title_cn: BlueBay 首席信息官：市场似乎对战争后果感到自满
summary: Mark Dowding, chief investment officer for fixed income at RBC BlueBay Asset Management, says markets appear to be complacent about the economic fallout from the Iran war. “It has the echoes of what we saw in the run-up to Covid actually landing on our shores,” Dowding tells Bloomberg Television. “It was only when it disrupted our lives that it really had a greater disruption in financial markets. And I do worry that something similar like that could be true here.”

title: BP Outruns Exxon to Emerge as Top Big-Oil Stock During Iran War
title_cn: 伊朗战争期间，英国石油公司（BP）超越埃克森美孚（Exxon）成为最大的大型石油股
summary: BP Plc, long the laggard among oil supermajors, is emerging as the sector’s top stock during the Iran war as it reaps “exceptional” trading profits and avoids the scale of production outages hurting rivals like Exxon Mobil Corp.

title: Congo Plans Paramilitary Unit for Mines with US, UAE Funding
title_cn: 刚果计划在美国和阿联酋的资助下建立准军事部队
summary: The Democratic Republic of Congo will create a paramilitary unit to police its mines with funding from the US and United Arab Emirates, the country’s General Inspectorate of Mines said.

title: Italy Decides to Extradite Chinese Man US Wants for Hacking
title_cn: 意大利决定引渡美国通缉的黑客中国人
summary: The Italian government decided to extradite a Chinese man wanted by the US on hacking charges, people familiar with the matter said on Sunday.

title: Wall Street Split on Quantum Computing Bet
title_cn: 华尔街对量子计算的赌注存在分歧
summary: Experts say quantum computing can reshape areas ranging from new drug discovery to machine learning and risk modeling in finance. But it’s also thought to be still years away from offering many practical solutions. As a breakthrough proves elusive in the quest to deploy the nascent technology and boost earnings, global finance is divided on how to proceed. Bloomberg’s William Shaw reports.

title: Ex-Tokyo Electron Staff Gets Decade in Jail for TSMC Breach
title_cn: 东京电子前员工因台积电违规被判入狱十年
summary: A Taiwanese court sentenced a former Tokyo Electron Ltd. employee to 10 years in prison for stealing Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.’s proprietary data, highlighting growing alarm over industrial espionage involving the island’s most strategic sector.

title: What's Actually Going On With Private Credit | Odd Lots
title_cn: 私人信贷到底发生了什么？零股
summary: The private credit market has grown enormously fast in recent years—so much so that by some estimates it's now bigger than the market for junk-rated corporate bonds. So what's driven all that growth? What impact has private credit had on other types of corporate debt? And why are there so many concerns around the space right now? In this episode we speak with John Sheehan and Craig Manchuck, two veteran portfolio managers for the strategic income fund at Osterweis Capital Management. We talk about the history of private credit before and after 2008, private credit's links with private equity and insurance, the prospect of higher defaults, and what to watch for right now. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hitachi Plans $3.1 Billion Buyback While Iran Conflict Weighs
title_cn: 伊朗冲突加剧之际日立计划回购 31 亿美元
summary: Hitachi Ltd. said it will buy back up to 3.56% of its outstanding stock for as much as ¥500 billion ($3.1 billion), the latest Japanese company to announce measures to beef up shareholder returns.

title: GA-Backed Acko Is Said to Hire Banks for $350 Million India IPO
title_cn: 据称，GA 支持的 Acko 将聘请银行进行 3.5 亿美元的印度 IPO
summary: Acko Technology & Services Pvt., an Indian digital insurer backed by General Atlantic, has hired investment banks for a potential initial public offering that could raise as much as $350 million, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Emma Grede on the No. 1 Trait She Looks For in Every Hire
title_cn: 艾玛·格雷德 (Emma Grede) 谈她在每位员工中寻找的第一特质
summary: Francine Lacqua sits down with Emma Grede — the power behind Good American and a founding partner of Skims — to unpack what it really takes to build a billion-dollar brand. Grede goes beyond the headlines, revealing the chaos behind her $1 million launch day and the mindset that helped her push through challenges. From "radical honesty" in leadership to bold views on work, ambition and success, she reveals the principles that have shaped her rise — and why she’s now stepping into the spotlight to help others do the same. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Your Next Pair of Good American Jeans Won’t Be Designed by AI
title_cn: 你的下一条优质美国牛仔裤不会由人工智能设计
summary: Emma Grede, the co-founder and chief executive officer of Good American jeans, said her businesses are being changed by artificial intelligence, though there are some areas that are off limits.

title: DeepSeek Slashes Fees for New AI Model in Chinese Price War
title_cn: DeepSeek 在中国价格战中大幅削减新人工智能模型的费用
summary: DeepSeek is aggressively pitching low-priced-plans for its just-released flagship model, intensifying competition across a Chinese artificial intelligence industry trying to take on Silicon Valley’s best.

title: AI Startup Sereact Raises $110 Million for Robots That Predict Consequences
title_cn: AI 初创公司 Sereact 融资 1.1 亿美元，用于开发预测后果的机器人
summary: Sereact, a German robotics software company, has raised $110 million in fresh funding to develop its artificial intelligence model that makes robots smarter and more adaptable to different tasks.

title: Keyence Jumps 16% to Daily Limit on Earnings Beat, Buyback Plan
title_cn: 基恩士股价上涨 16%，因盈利超预期和回购计划而涨至每日上限
summary: Keyence Corp. shares surged 16%, the biggest gain since August 2024, after the Japanese maker of factory automation sensors delivered quarterly operating income that exceeded analyst estimates and said it will seek investor approval to amend its charter to enable buybacks.

title: Chipmaker Rohm’s Shares Dive After Denso Weighs Scrapping Buyout
title_cn: 电装考虑放弃收购后芯片制造商罗姆股价暴跌
summary: Rohm Co. shares fell as much as 16% after Denso Corp. said it’s considering withdrawing a proposal to take over the power chip maker, dashing hopes for a quick consolidation of Japan’s fragmented supply chain.

title: AI Boom Drowns Out War Fears to Fuel Asia’s Great Market Divide
title_cn: 人工智能的繁荣淹没了战争恐惧，助长了亚洲巨大的市场分化
summary: Asia’s markets are behaving as though two different worlds exist at once.

title: China’s Tech-Heavy EVs Dominate Beijing’s Auto Show
title_cn: 中国科技含量高的电动汽车主导北京车展
summary: Legacy foreign automakers once held the keys to China’s car market, but the 2026 Beijing Auto Show reveals a dramatic power shift. From onboard cinemas to built-in toilets, domestic EV makers are winning over consumers with rapid-fire tech innovation and aggressive pricing. From the show floor in Beijing, Bloomberg’s Stephen Engle finds that as Western brands scramble to partner with local rivals to survive, China is now firmly in the driver’s seat. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Warner Bros. Approved the Paramount Deal. Here’s What Comes Next.
title_cn: 华纳兄弟批准了派拉蒙交易。接下来会发生什么。
summary: The company’s streaming service has lost more than $11 billion and can’t keep customers form canceling

title: Canadian Province of Manitoba Says It Will Ban Social Media, AI For Youth
title_cn: 加拿大曼尼托巴省表示将禁止青少年使用社交媒体和人工智能
summary: The Canadian province of Manitoba plans to prohibit young people from accessing social media and artificial intelligence chatbots, its leader said.

title: Apple’s Cook Gives Ternus a Pipeline of 10 Major New Product Categories
title_cn: Apple 库克为 Ternus 提供 10 种主​​要新产品类别
summary: Also: John Ternus talks AI and services with employees.

title: Musk Vies to Turn X Into Super App With Banking Tool Near Launch
title_cn: 马斯克力争将X打造成超级应用程序，银行工具即将推出
summary: More than three years after acquiring Twitter, Elon Musk says he’s nearing his long-stated goal of turning it into an “everything app” with a new financial services tool that he pledged to launch for the public this month.

title: China Formalizes Labor Rules for Gig Workers on Online Platforms
title_cn: 中国正式制定网络平台零工劳动法规
summary: China formalized its first comprehensive policy framework for “new employment groups,” including delivery riders and livestreamers, signaling a shift from ad-hoc regulation to normalization of the platform economy.

title: DeepSeek V4 Delay Shows Shift to China Chips, CCTV Account Says
title_cn: CCTV 报道称 DeepSeek V4 延迟表明转向中国芯片
summary: DeepSeek’s delayed release of its V4 model points to a strategic shift toward deeper integration with China’s domestic chip ecosystem, according to Yuyuantantian, a social media account affiliated with the government-controlled China Central Television.

title: Beijing Warns EU After China Firms Included in Russia Sanctions
title_cn: 中国企业被列入俄罗斯制裁名单后，北京警告欧盟
summary: China said it will take necessary measures after the European Union added Chinese entities to its latest Russia sanctions package, warning that all consequences would be borne by the EU.

title: Private-Sector Sleuthing Becomes Big Business for US Tech Startup
title_cn: 私营部门侦查成为美国科技初创公司的大生意
summary: Trump’s economic crackdown on China’s US interests is creating opportunities for a Utah-based intelligence firm

title: Hungary Billionaire Meszaros Seeks Damage Control With Magyar
title_cn: 匈牙利亿万富翁梅萨罗斯寻求与马扎尔一起控制损害
summary: Hungarian billionaire Lorinc Meszaros, a close business ally of outgoing Prime Minister Viktor Orban, has reached out to the country’s incoming leader to contain damage to his business empire amid a free-fall in the stock price of his conglomerate Opus Nyrt.

title: Starmer Stays Defiant as Mandelson Saga Continues to Swirl
title_cn: 曼德尔森传奇继续发酵，斯塔默保持挑衅态度
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer insists he’ll remain in the job and lead the Labour Party into the next general election, even as the controversy over his appointment of Peter Mandelson as ambassador to the US refuses to die down.

title: Iran’s Araghchi Arrives in Russia With US Talks at a Stalemate
title_cn: 伊朗阿拉格奇抵达俄罗斯，美国谈判陷入僵局
summary: Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrived in Russia on Monday for a meeting with President Vladimir Putin, as talks with the US on ending an eight-week war remain at an impasse.

title: Budget Airlines Ask White House for $2.5 Billion Relief Plan, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称，廉价航空公司向白宫请求 25 亿美元的救助计划
summary: Budget airlines are banding together to ask the White House for a relief plan worth $2.5 billion in exchange for convertible equity stakes in the carriers, according to the Wall Street Journal.

title: What We Know About the Gunman in DC Gala Attack
title_cn: 我们对 DC Gala 袭击事件中枪手的了解
summary: The man accused of storming the White House Correspondents’ Dinner, Cole Tomas Allen, spent years quietly acquiring his arsenal. Allen then traveled cross-country by rail before checking into the Washington Hilton. The suspect’s exact targets and motives weren’t clear, although he did send a lengthy manifesto to family members that was seen by Bloomberg where he appeared to blast President Donald Trump as a “traitor” who committed crimes. Bloomberg’s Laura Davison reports.

title: Mali Defense Minister Killed in Suicide Attack, Government Says
title_cn: 政府称马里国防部长在自杀式袭击中丧生
summary: Mali’s defense minister was killed in a suicide attack on his home during a coordinated assault by an al-Qaeda affiliate across several locations in the West African country.

title: Stalled US-Iran Talks Show Limits of Pakistan’s Mediation Drive
title_cn: 美伊谈判陷入僵局显示巴基斯坦调解努力的局限性
summary: The US and Iran failed to kick off a second round of peace talks this weekend despite a last-minute push by Pakistan, delivering a blow to Islamabad’s efforts to broker a settlement to end the two-month-old war.

title: Philippine VP Duterte’s Spouse Files Complaint Against Central Bank Head
title_cn: 菲律宾副总统杜特尔特的配偶向央行行长提出投诉
summary: Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte’s husband has filed a complaint against central bank Governor Eli Remolona over the public disclosure of their bank records during a congressional hearing tied to her impeachment.

title: Poland Pushes for New European Tools to Finance Defense Spending
title_cn: 波兰推动新的欧洲工具为国防支出提供资金
summary: Poland’s finance minister is campaigning to unlock new European sources of defense funding to avoid further straining the budget.

title: Iran Offers Deal to US to Reopen Strait and Delay Nuclear Talks, Axios Says
title_cn: Axios 表示，伊朗向美国提出重新开放海峡并推迟核谈判的协议
summary: Iran has given the US a new proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end the war that includes postponing nuclear negotiations, Axios reported, citing a US official and two people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Alleged DC Gala Gunman Believed to Be Targeting US Officials
title_cn: 据称 DC Gala 枪手的目标是美国官员
summary: The armed suspect who tried to enter a Washington ballroom where President Donald Trump was set to speak was likely targeting administration officials, Acting US Attorney General Todd Blanche said. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US-Iran Talks Stall as Conflict Nears Two-Month Mark
title_cn: 冲突接近两个月后，美伊谈判陷入僵局
summary: Efforts to resume peace talks over the Iran war stalled after US President Donald Trump canceled a planned trip by his top envoys and the Islamic Republic said it won’t negotiate so long as it’s being threatened. Bloomberg's Laura Davison reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says Gala Attack Shows Security Need for His Ballroom
title_cn: 特朗普表示，晚会袭击表明他的宴会厅需要安全保障
summary: President Donald Trump jumped on Saturday night’s shooting at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner to add a security rationale to his case for building a massive White House ballroom that he has wanted for years.

title: Chevron CEO Says Venezuela Must Do More for Oil Industry Revival
title_cn: 雪佛龙首席执行官表示委内瑞拉必须为石油工业复兴做出更多努力
summary: Chevron Corp. Chief Executive Officer Mike Wirth said changes to Venezuela’s oil policy are a sign of progress in trying to attract foreign investment, though further measures are needed.

title: Another Attack at ‘Hinckley Hilton’ Raises New Security Concerns
title_cn: “欣克利希尔顿”的另一次袭击引发了新的安全担忧
summary: An attempted attack at Saturday’s White House Correspondents’ Dinner is spurring fresh questions about the security around President Donald Trump and other top officials.

title: Gunman in DC Gala Attack Built Up Arsenal to Target US Officials
title_cn: 华盛顿晚会袭击中的枪手建立了武器库以瞄准美国官员
summary: The man accused of storming the White House Correspondents’ Dinner spent years quietly acquiring his arsenal, purchasing a shotgun from a Torrance, California, firearms dealer eight months before the attack and a semi-automatic pistol two years earlier, according to a law enforcement intelligence profile reviewed by Bloomberg.

title: Ex-Israeli Prime Ministers Unite Parties to Take On Netanyahu
title_cn: 以色列前总理联合各方对抗内塔尼亚胡
summary: Naftali Bennett and Yair Lapid, two former prime ministers of Israel, announced the merging of their parties, creating a new political entity that could outpoll that of Benjamin Netanyahu’s Likud in the upcoming election.

title: Rep. Beyer: "We Are More Divided Than We've Ever Been" Following DC Shooting
title_cn: 众议员拜尔：华盛顿枪击事件后“我们比以往任何时候都更加分裂”
summary: Rep. Don Beyer (D-Virginia) talks to "Bloomberg This Weekend" about his concerns following the shooting at the White House Correspondents' Dinner and the redistricting vote in Virginia that could tilt the balance in the Midterm elections. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. McCaul on How to Combat Political Violence
title_cn: 众议员麦考尔谈如何打击政治暴力
summary: Rep. Michael McCaul (R-Texas) shares his experience with David Gura and Christina Ruffini as a guest at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, where shots were fired outside the ballroom. He tells "Bloomberg This Weekend" what needs to be done to tone down political rhetoric following another shooting targeting President Trump. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US-Iran Peace Talks Stall as Conflict Nears Two-Month Mark
title_cn: 冲突接近两个月，美伊和平谈判陷入僵局
summary: Efforts to resume peace talks over the Iran war stalled after US President Donald Trump canceled a planned trip by his top envoys and the Islamic Republic said it won’t negotiate so long as it’s being threatened.

title: Bayer Banks on US Supreme Court’s Help to Rein In Roundup Lawsuits
title_cn: 拜耳银行呼吁美国最高法院帮助遏制农达诉讼
summary: Justices hear appeal of verdict linking weedkiller to cancer as company seeks to curtail litigation that’s been a drag on shares.

title: Gunman at DC Gala Believed to Be Targeting US Officials
title_cn: DC Gala上的枪手被认为是针对美国官员
summary: The armed suspect who tried to enter a Washington ballroom where President Donald Trump was speaking was likely targeting administration officials, Acting US Attorney General Todd Blanche said.

title: Gunman at DC Gala Sought to Assassinate Trump, Leavitt Says
title_cn: 莱维特称，华盛顿晚会上的枪手试图刺杀特朗普
summary: White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt described the gunman at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner as a “crazy person who sought to assassinate the President and kill as many top Trump administration officials as possible.”

title: Australia Adds to Weapons Buildup With New Armored Vehicle Deal
title_cn: 澳大利亚通过新的装甲车交易增加武器建设
summary: Australia said it will spend more than $800 million to buy armored vehicles, adding to its recent spurt of weapons purchases as the government implements its biggest peacetime increase in defense spending.
